title: More Ores N' Tools
description: a simple mod that adds more ores, and the ores Armour and Tool counterparts
body:
# This project has been archived as I have lost the files and I just dont want to work on this mess of a mod anymore anyway
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d12b801ef5efffe41d1a6ae07f4c8b161d563a77_0.webp)
# A mod that adds a bunch of new ores, tools, Armor!
(Created whith MCreator, its my first mod so please report any bugs or features!)

Tools and Armor stats:
[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1_AvdCBGsrForJgC6D5M7OaqvSUWRloax?usp=drive_link](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1_AvdCBGsrForJgC6D5M7OaqvSUWRloax?usp=drive_link) (i didnt want to write evrey stat here, that would take several hours to do, may do it later though when i have time)

Titanium Crafting recipies:
![crafting recipies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/326cdff3a44f32144dc30c358c53f0ac8e5490d5.png)

All the other recipies are the vanilla way of crafting the tool/armour piece but whith their respiective item.

# To Do
- better modrinth discription
- ~~Add Copper tools~~ Added in V2
- ~~Better ore textures~~ Added in V2

# Requiernments
- Neoforge version 123 or newer
